svg.title: CoreGate Cloud system architecture
svg.desc: Full system architecture from user browser through CDN, Next.js frontend, API Gateway, Spring Boot microservices, PostgreSQL, Redis, S3, and VNPAY payment gateway

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Tell me more about the Auth Service in CoreGate Cloud')
sendPrompt('Tell me more about the Product Service in CoreGate Cloud')
sendPrompt('Tell me more about the Order Service in CoreGate Cloud')
sendPrompt('Tell me more about the Payment Service in CoreGate Cloud')
sendPrompt('Tell me more about the Transaction Service in CoreGate Cloud')
sendPrompt('Tell me more about the Download/License Service in CoreGate Cloud')
sendPrompt('Tell me more about the Webhook Handler in CoreGate Cloud')
sendPrompt('Tell me more about the Notification Service in CoreGate Cloud')
sendPrompt('Explain the full VNPAY payment flow in CoreGate Cloud')
